name: Jellied Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cabbage, Carrots, and Green Bell Pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in hot water.
2. Add cold water, pickle juice, lemon juice, salt, onion, and sour cream to the dissolved gelatin.
3. Use an electric mixer on low speed to blend the mixture until smooth.
4. Chill until the mixture begins to congeal.
5. Fold in the finely chopped vegetables (cabbage, carrots, and green bell pepper).
6. Chill until firm.
Makes 24 individual molds.
